sections.intro:
TheSteel Judokais one of theSquadsfromInto The Breach, unlockable for 3 coins. They consist of theJudo Mech,Siege MechandGravity Mech.
Rather than relying on high damage from mechs the Steel Judoka has little offensive power, relying instead on using positional weapons, pulling and pushing to make the Vek target each other. This is essential for dealing with enemies asVek Hormonesare immediately active.
sections.Strategies:
- Since you will mostly rely on Vek damage to kill enemies, constantly check the Attack Order. In addition, look for Vek like theFireflyorGastropod, as they can easily target other Vek with their attacks and prevent two enemies from damaging the grid by being intercepted.
  - Prioritize upgrading +1 damage on Vek Hormones and Buildings Immune on the Cluster Artillery - both upgrades take advantage of the squad's strength in turning enemy fire against them.
  - Because the Judo Mech has armor, you can still hit it with the cluster artillery without taking damage.
  - Look for an enemy two spaces away from a deadly tile -- vice fist can throw them into it.
  - You can use the repositioning abilities of the squad in succession: first place two enemies adjacent to each other, then get bonus damage on knockback.
  - Be wary of taking on an island if it hasBurrowersandAlpha Burrowers; since these enemies are stable, they cannot be targetted by Vice Fist nor pulled by Grav Well, which makes them particularly difficult to deal with multiples using the Steel Judoka's default weaponry. Ensure you have some other weapon or ability with the Judo Mech at least to deal direct damage to them first.
  - Many pilots can synergize with this squad:Henry KwanandProsperocan more easily get into position to throw enemies by moving through obstacles. Prospero can also let the Judo Mech throw Vek on a ledge into insta-kill tiles.Harold Schmidtgives a free additional "weapon" to knockback enemies.Kazaaakplethon the Judo Mech allows it to attack directly in front, significantly boosting its power.Chen RongorArchimedescan get the Judo Mech out of a bad spot after attacking, compensating for the limited choices of tiles to attack from.Kai Milleron the Siege Mech can make the killing of Vek faster, especially as she will raise the maximum damage of Cluster Artillery to an impressive 3 points.
sections.Trivia: - The Vek Hormones passive equipped with the Gravity Mech also increases the damage done byrobotic enemies, despite not being classified as Vek nor affected by Psions.

full_text:
Steel Judoka
“
These Mechs specialize in positional manipulation to turn the Vek against each other.
„
The
Steel Judoka
is one of the
Squads
from
Into The Breach
, unlockable for 3 coins. They consist of the
Judo Mech
,
Siege Mech
and
Gravity Mech
.
Rather than relying on high damage from mechs the Steel Judoka has little offensive power, relying instead on using positional weapons, pulling and pushing to make the Vek target each other. This is essential for dealing with enemies as
Vek Hormones
are immediately active.

Achievements
[
]
Unbreakable
Have Mech Armor absorb 5 damage in a single battle
Unwitting Allies
Have 4 enemies die from enemy fire in a single battle
Mass Displacement
Push 3 enemies with a single attack
Strategies
[
]
Since you will mostly rely on Vek damage to kill enemies, constantly check the Attack Order. In addition, look for Vek like the
Firefly
or
Gastropod
, as they can easily target other Vek with their attacks and prevent two enemies from damaging the grid by being intercepted.
Prioritize upgrading +1 damage on Vek Hormones and Buildings Immune on the Cluster Artillery - both upgrades take advantage of the squad's strength in turning enemy fire against them.
Because the Judo Mech has armor, you can still hit it with the cluster artillery without taking damage.
Look for an enemy two spaces away from a deadly tile -- vice fist can throw them into it.
You can use the repositioning abilities of the squad in succession: first place two enemies adjacent to each other, then get bonus damage on knockback.
Be wary of taking on an island if it has
Burrowers
and
Alpha Burrowers
; since these enemies are stable, they cannot be targetted by Vice Fist nor pulled by Grav Well, which makes them particularly difficult to deal with multiples using the Steel Judoka's default weaponry. Ensure you have some other weapon or ability with the Judo Mech at least to deal direct damage to them first.
Many pilots can synergize with this squad:
Henry Kwan
and
Prospero
can more easily get into position to throw enemies by moving through obstacles. Prospero can also let the Judo Mech throw Vek on a ledge into insta-kill tiles.
Harold Schmidt
gives a free additional "weapon" to knockback enemies.
Kazaaakpleth
on the Judo Mech allows it to attack directly in front, significantly boosting its power.
Chen Rong
or
Archimedes
can get the Judo Mech out of a bad spot after attacking, compensating for the limited choices of tiles to attack from.
Kai Miller
on the Siege Mech can make the killing of Vek faster, especially as she will raise the maximum damage of Cluster Artillery to an impressive 3 points.
Trivia
[
]
The Vek Hormones passive equipped with the Gravity Mech also increases the damage done by
robotic enemies
, despite not being classified as Vek nor affected by Psions.
